title: CurationCandidatePromoted payload
description: Emitted when a curation_candidate transitions from status='pending' to status='promoted', creating a new knowledge_pointers row. Two trigger paths: MCP curation_promote (human-driven) sets promoted_automatically=false; curate-rescore --pass run sets promoted_automatically=true when quality_score >= AutoPromoteThreshold (0.85).

candidate_id.description: Row id in curation_candidates that was promoted.

pointer_id.description: Row id of the new knowledge_pointers row created from this candidate.

origin.description: Which discovery path originally produced the candidate.

quality_score.description: The candidate's quality_score at the moment of promotion. May be null for human-driven promotions of unscored candidates (an MCP user may promote without waiting for the rescore pass to score).

promoted_automatically.description: true if curate-rescore auto-promoted at threshold; false if MCP curation_promote (human-driven).
